Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I-I just wanted to apologize for bringing up an uncomfortable topic like that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 0 25 25}But I think your advice really, um... helped my friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11404 0 0}Um... Your coffee is going to get cold.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11454 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}O-Oh, um... Maybe you should've ordered iced coffee, then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 4 25 25}...Oh! Sorry! I wasn't trying to tell you what to do. I-I just thought my suggestion could help a little...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro is smiling a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}To be honest, I've got quite a sweet tooth. I can never say no to anything sweet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro is smiling again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}...It seems like all I've been doing is apologizing today... Sorry about that, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro has fallen silent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11493 0 0}I... I really enjoy getting coffee with you like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}I kind of wish my time with you would just last forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We chatted for a while longer before[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
